name: careerproof-skills
description: AI-powered career and workforce intelligence — 13 guided skills + 67 MCP tools backed by 50+ expert-curated sources (HBR, McKinsey, BCG, Gartner) with live web search. CeeVee skills (4) for CV optimization, quick review, career intelligence chat, and career reports.
